phenotype_policy: Missing phenotype annotations are excluded and counted; they are never converted to negative labels.

tasks.name: AE and Hamiltonian self-consistency
tasks.claim_boundary: Representation fit only; not biological causality or phenotype accuracy.

tasks.name: Substep Conditional Step Prediction
tasks.primary_input: v4 inference records with complete action-bearing remaining_layers/events; historical v2/v3 only through audited compatibility paths
tasks.status: v4 adapter runnable; formal scoring waits for the audited v4 release and predictions
tasks.claim_boundary: Ambiguous clauses are excluded; within-layer text order is not treated as causal without independent ordering provenance.

tasks.name: PCTE
tasks.primary_input: paired predicted/gold latent trajectories plus fixed-representation manifest
model_dependency: same base/adapter/AE representation for both trajectories
tasks.claim_boundary: Latent representation agreement; distinct from HNN rollout self-consistency.

tasks.name: Causal direction, shuffle, and unrelated reranking
tasks.claim_boundary: No automatic energy-monotonicity or direction-as-time claim.

tasks.name: Knockout and rescue
tasks.primary_input: experimentally evidenced interventions and calibrated phenotype probabilities
model_dependency: prompt-conditioned inference or separately trained intervention-conditioned dynamics
tasks.claim_boundary: Time-only F(t) is not intervention u; missing phenotype is not negative.

tasks.name: Perturbed-cell transfer
tasks.claim_boundary: The pathway checkpoint is not directly AnnData/C2S-compatible.

tasks.name: BioMaze external benchmark
tasks.primary_input: official frozen BioMaze questions and model predictions
tasks.claim_boundary: Zero-shot status requires contamination audit and checkpoint chronology.
